30:1:1.m: A-L-M (the letter names Alif, Lam, Meem)

30:2:1.m: she/it was defeated (referring to الرُّومُ - the Roman Empire)

30:2:2.m: the Romans (subject of غُلِبَتِ - were defeated)

30:3:1.m: in (location in أَدْنَى ٱلْأَرْضِ - lowest land)

30:3:3.m: of the earth (after فِي in أَدْنَى)

30:4:5.m: the matter/affair (subject of this part of the ayah)

أَمْرُ: matter/affair (subject of this part of the ayah)

30:6:9.m: of the people (possessed by أَكْثَرَ - most)

30:6:11.m: they know (referring to most people in لٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ)

30:7:1.m: they know (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in context)

30:7:5.m: the worldly life (contrasted with ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ - the afterlife)

30:7:8.m: the hereafter (contrasted with ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا - the worldly life)

30:7:10.m: those who are unaware/heedless (plural, in a grammatical state)

30:8:1.m: And did they not (think about يَتَفَكَّرُوا۟)

30:8:4.m: themselves (referring to the people being discussed)

30:8:6.m: he created (subject of the verb that created السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ - the heavens and earth)

30:8:7.m: Allah (the one true God) (subject of خَلَقَ)

30:8:8.m: of the heavens (object of خَلَقَ - created)

30:8:9.m: and the earth (object of خَلَقَ - created)

30:8:11.m: between them both (referring to the heavens and earth)

ًا: (describing how many people are disbelievers in لَكٰفِرُونَ)

30:8:22.m: surely they are those who reject truth

30:9:5.m: so they may look carefully (at what happened to previous nations)

30:9:9.m: those who (referring to the people mentioned in كَانَ)

نَ: (referring to the people mentioned in كَانَ)

30:9:15.m: a strength (as the object being described)

30:9:16.m: and they caused to stir up

30:9:23.m: their messengers (who came to جَآءَتْ them)

30:9:26.m: he/it was (describing how something used to be)

نَ: was (describing how something used to be)

30:10:2.m: he was (describes the state of عٰقِبَةَ)

30:10:7.m: that (connects two parts of the sentence)

30:11:1.m: Allah (The One True God who is the subject of يَبْدَؤُا۟ - He begins)

30:11:8.m: you all are being returned (to Him)

30:12:1.m: and on the day (when تَقُومُ happens)

30:13:7.m: and they were (connecting to كٰفِرِينَ - disbelievers)

30:13:8.m: with their partners (referring to the disbelievers)

30:14:3.m: The Hour (referring to the Day of Judgment)

سَّاعَةُ: Hour (referring to the Day of Judgment)

30:14:4.m: on that day (when the Hour occurs)

30:15:1.m: then as for (introduces what happens to those who believe)

30:15:3.m: they believed (connected to الَّذِينَ - those who)

30:15:6.m: so they (will be in a garden)

30:15:8.m: in a garden (connected to فِى before it)

30:16:8.m: then/so those (showing consequence for the disbelievers)

30:16:11.m: those who are made present (male plural doers)

30:18:5.m: and the earth (affected by فِى/in from the previous ayah)

30:18:7.m: and when (time of تُظْهِرُونَ - you show)

30:19:1.m: he makes (something) exit (subject of يُخْرِجُ ٱلْحَىَّ)

30:19:2.m: the living one (object of يُخْرِجُ - brings forth)

30:19:4.m: the dead one (possessed by/connected to something)

30:19:5.m: and he brings out (the dead from the living)

30:19:6.m: the dead (as the object being brought out)

30:19:10.m: the earth (object of يُحْىِ - he gives life to)

َ: (object of يُحْىِ - he gives life to)

30:19:12.m: its death (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)

30:19:13.m: and likewise (connected to تُخْرَجُونَ - you will be brought forth)

كَذٰلِكَ: likewise (connected to تُخْرَجُونَ - you will be brought forth)

30:20:5.m: from (with emphasis, connecting تُرَابٍ to خَلَقَكُم)

30:20:6.m: dust/soil (as an indefinite substance, referring to what humans were created from)

ٍ: (as an indefinite substance, referring to what humans were created from)

30:20:8.m: when/whenever (introducing a condition that will happen)

إِذَآ: when/whenever (introducing a condition that will happen)

30:21:7.m: your selves (referring to all of you)

30:21:9.m: so that you all may find tranquility (with إِلَيْهَا)

30:21:10.m: towards her (referring to spouse/mate in أَزْوٰجًا)

30:21:11.m: and he made (connected to خَلَقَ - he created)

30:21:13.m: love (as something Allah places between spouses)

30:21:14.m: and mercy (as something Allah puts between spouses)

رَحْمَةً: mercy (as something Allah puts between spouses)

30:21:17.m: that (pointing to what was mentioned before)

30:22:4.m: of the heavens (possessed by/connected to something)

30:22:11.m: that (pointing to what was mentioned before)

30:23:3.m: your sleep (referring to all people being addressed)

كُم: your (referring to all people being addressed)

30:23:5.m: and the daytime (contrasted with بِٱلَّيْلِ - by night)

30:23:11.m: that (showing distance when speaking to one person)

30:24:4.m: the lightning (object of يُرِيكُمُ - shows you)

30:24:5.m: in fear (describing how He shows you البَرْقَ)

30:24:11.m: and then he gives life (to الْأَرْضَ)

30:24:13.m: the earth (object of يُحْىِۦ - he gives life to)

َ: (object of يُحْىِۦ - he gives life to)

30:24:18.m: that (referring to the signs just mentioned)

30:24:20.m: surely for a people (who يَعْقِلُونَ - use reason)

30:24:21.m: they use reason (referring to people who reflect on Allah's signs)

30:25:6.m: and the earth (subject along with السَّمَآءُ)

30:25:10.m: he called you all (object of إِذَا)

30:26:1.m: and to Him (belongs مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)

30:27:17.m: The Mighty One (one of Allah's names)

30:27:18.m: The All-Wise (as a name of Allah)

30:28:1.m: he presented (an example for لَكُم - for you)

30:28:14.m: in (location within what رَزَقْنٰكُمْ - We provided you)

30:28:21.m: like your fear (in comparison to تَخَافُونَهُمْ - you fear them)

30:28:23.m: like that, thus (connects to نُفَصِّلُ - we explain in detail)

30:28:25.m: the signs (that are being explained in نُفَصِّلُ)

30:30:1.m: so establish! (command to one person, affecting وَجْهَكَ)

30:30:4.m: as one who turns away from falsehood

حَنِيف: one who turns away from falsehood

30:30:7.m: which/that (feminine, referring to فِطْرَتَ - natural state)

ٱلَّتِى: which/that (feminine, referring to فِطْرَتَ - natural state)

30:30:12.m: act of changing/altering completely (object of لا)

30:30:16.m: the complete way of life (subject of ذٰلِكَ)

30:30:17.m: the firmly established, upright one (describing الدِّينُ)

30:30:20.m: of the people (owned by أَكْثَرَ - most)

30:30:22.m: they know/are knowing (referring to a group of men or mixed group)

30:31:2.m: to Him (referring to Allah in مُنِيبِينَ إِلَيْهِ - turning back to Him)

30:31:4.m: and establish! (command to many people) (connected to وَٱتَّقُوهُ)

30:31:8.m: from/among the (الْمُشْرِكِينَ - those who associate partners with Allah)

30:32:9.m: with what/with whatever (connected to فَرِحُونَ - rejoicing)

30:32:11.m: they are happy (referring to those who divided their religion)

30:33:3.m: the people (being affected by مَسَّ - touched/afflicted)

30:33:6.m: their Lord (who they call upon in دَعَوْا)

30:33:7.m: those who earnestly return (to Allah in repentance)

30:33:8.m: to him (they turn to him in repentance)

30:33:10.m: when (with emphasis, indicating a future condition)

30:33:14.m: when (followed by أَذَاقَهُم - He gave them to taste)

30:33:15.m: a group (subject of يُشْرِكُونَ - they associate partners)

30:34:1.m: so that they may reject/deny (connected to ءَاتَيْنٰهُمْ - what We gave them)

30:34:4.m: so enjoy yourselves thoroughly! (responding to their disbelief mentioned in لِيَكْفُرُوا۟)

30:35:4.m: any authority/proof (object of أَنزَلْنَا - we sent down)

30:36:3.m: the people (object of أَذَقْنَا - we gave them to taste)

َ: (object of أَذَقْنَا - we gave them to taste)

30:37:2.m: they see (subject of أَوَلَمْ - 'do they not')

30:37:4.m: The One True God (object of يَرَوْا - they see)

30:37:9.m: and he determines/measures (paired with يَبْسُطُ meaning "he extends")

30:37:10.m: indeed/verily (emphasizes the statement يَبْسُطُ ٱلرِّزْقَ that follows)

30:37:12.m: that (pointing to what was just mentioned)

30:38:3.m: the relatives (who are being given their rights)

قُرْبَىٰ: relatives (who are being given their rights)

30:38:7.m: of the established path/way (possessed by/connected to something)

30:38:12.m: face/pleasure (of اللَّهِ, being sought by يُرِيدُونَ)

أُولٰٓئِكَ: those (pointing to something far) (subject of هُمُ)

30:39:10.m: that it may increase (in people's wealth)

30:39:22.m: those who multiply (their wealth through usury)

ُ: (as the subject of خَلَقَكُمْ - created you)

30:41:10.m: so that he makes them taste

30:43:15.m: on that day (when they will split up)

30:43:16.m: they (all) become completely divided (into separate groups)

30:46:6.m: as bringers of good news (describing the winds)

30:46:13.m: and so that you all seek

30:46:16.m: and perhaps you all (will be thankful)

30:47:9.m: with the clear proofs (object of جَاءُو)

30:47:13.m: they committed crimes (referring to those who rejected the messengers)

30:48:6.m: clouds (object of فَتُثِيرُ - it stirs up)

30:49:6.m: it is being sent down (referring to rain)

30:49:10.m: surely they were in complete despair

30:51:5.m: becoming intensely yellow (describing what they saw)

30:52:11.m: those turning away (describes the people in ولّوا)

30:54:2.m: The one who (connects Allah to His actions)

َ: (referring to Allah making strength after weakness)

30:59:5.m: hearts (of those who do not know)

30:60:7.m: he surely makes light of you
